title: Perwaghagh Falls
tagline: Perwaghagh Falls — heritage city of Jharkhand

overview.short: Perwaghagh Falls is a waterfall with clear water flow on Chata River in the Fatka panchayat of Torpa block in Khunti district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.
overview.description: Perwaghagh Falls is a waterfall with clear water flow on Chata River in the Fatka panchayat of Torpa block in Khunti district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Rania block
topPlaces.description: Rania block (also spelled Raniya) is a CD block that forms an administrative division in the Khunti Sadar subdivision of Khunti district, in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Rania, Khunti
topPlaces.description: Rania (spelled Raniiyan in census records) is a village in the Rania CD block in the Khunti Sadar subdivision of the Khunti district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

items.note: Rania block (also spelled Raniya) is a CD block that forms an administrative division in the Khunti Sadar subdivision of Khunti district, in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Perwaghagh Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Perwaghagh Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Perwaghagh Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (56 km) and the nearest railway station is Ranchi Junction (62 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Perwaghagh Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Perwaghagh Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Perwaghagh Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Perwaghagh Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Perwaghagh Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rania block, Rania, Khunti.
